messages.content:
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: Bearer sk-admin' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model": "interns1_1_base02_20260106a_lr3e5_512gpu_fp8_vlm1", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hello, how are you?"}]}' http://s-20260104203038-22bhb-decode.ailab-evalservice.svc:4000/v1/chat/completions  
改成stream

```bash
curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: Bearer sk-admin' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model": "interns1_1_base02_20260106a_lr3e5_512gpu_fp8_vlm1", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hello, how are you?"}], "stream": true}' http://s-20260104203038-22bhb-decode.ailab-evalservice.svc:4000/v1/chat/completions
```

主要改动：
- 在 JSON 数据中添加了 `"stream": true` 参数

这样就会启用流式响应模式，服务器会逐步返回生成的内容而不是一次性返回完整响应。
